section.heading: Records

content.p: The proprietor of a bonded wine cellar or a tax-paid wine bottling house shall keep such rec­ords and file such returns, in such form and containing such information, as the Secretary may by regulations provide.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 85–859, title II, § 201, Sept. 2, 1958, 72 Stat. 1381; amended Pub. L. 94–455, title XIX, § 1906(b)(13)(A), Oct. 4, 1976, 90 Stat. 1834.)

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: A prior section 5367, act Aug. 16, 1954, ch. 736, 68A Stat. 666, consisted of provisions similar to those comprising this section, prior to the general revision of this chapter by Pub. L. 85–859.

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 1976—Pub. L. 94–455 struck out “or his delegate” after “Secretary”.
